word: H3614 - כָּלִבֹּו - Kâlibbôw - kaw-lib-bo' - Of the house of Caleb

sections.paragraph:
Original: כּלבי כּלבּו o

Transliteration: kâlibbô kâlêbı̂y

Phonetic: kaw-lib-bo'

BDB Definition:

Calebite = see Caleb " dog"
  1. a descendant of Caleb

Origin: probably by erroneous transcription for Kalebiy kaw-lay-bee'

TWOT entry: patronymically from 03612

Part(s) of speech:
